about.title: About
about.content: Full-stack web developer, 4k+ stars on open source projects. Used to write code with React, Next.js, TypeScript -- now I write code with Claude Code and Codex. Mass-produced programmer turned typist (jk). Occasionally goes unhinged on the blog.

projects.title: Projects
projects.esDragerSub: Open Source Drag Component Library | Vue.js, React, TypeScript
projects.esDragerDesc:
- Drag, resize, and rotate component library for Vue and React, 500+ weekly npm downloads.
- Features snap alignment, grid system, and boundary constraints with full documentation site.
projects.vtableDesc:
- Contributed to a high-performance multidimensional data analysis table library by ByteDance VisActor team.
- Supports million-row rendering, Gantt charts, custom editors, and chart integration.
projects.prohelenSub: Visual Prompt Engineering Platform | Next.js, React
projects.prohelenDesc:
- No-code visual prompt engineering platform for building, managing, and sharing AI workflows.
- Drag-and-drop blocks, real-time preview, reusable templates, and API integration.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.cofounderDesc:
- Building an AI-powered storytelling platform that turns ideas into immersive visual narratives.
- Full-stack development with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Redis, and AI SDK v6.
- Designed the story template system with scroll-driven animations (Framer Motion) and video export (Remotion).
experience.fullstackCompany: 上海象多网络科技有限公司
experience.fullstackDesc:
- Developed and maintained multiple web applications using React and Node.js, implementing RESTful APIs and real-time features.
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver product features on schedule.
experience.digitmasterDesc:
- Led frontend monorepo migration to Nuxt.js, unifying project structure and build pipeline.
- Built an AI chat interface with streaming responses and multi-turn conversation using Vue.js and UnoCSS.
- Drove frontend code refactoring and i18n internationalization implementation.
experience.telepaceDesc:
- Built an AI-powered survey platform with dynamic form rendering, conditional logic, and real-time analytics using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
- Implemented responsive layouts and accessibility features across the platform.
experience.kanjiangainianCompany: 看见概念（上海）智能科技有限公司
experience.kanjiangainianDesc:
- Built cross-platform mini-programs with Taro + React; created virtual list components to optimize large dataset rendering.
- Set up monorepo architecture for multi-project management; rebuilt the company website with Astro for better performance and SEO.
- Practiced Scrum agile development; developed backend API services with Nest.js.
experience.yidaCompany: 壹沓科技（上海）有限公司
experience.yidaDesc: - Gained hands-on frontend development experience building UI components and integrating REST APIs in a production codebase.

awards.title: Awards
awards.outstandingDesc: - Awarded as an outstanding student for academic excellence.
awards.scholarshipDesc: - Received a scholarship for outstanding performance in subject competitions.

terminal.title: Orion's Terminal
terminal.aboutBio: A software engineer who loves building elegant solutions and exploring new technologies. Currently focused on AI agent development and always learning something new 🚀
